---
format: html
---

# CoastWatch Utilities {#cwutils}

The **CoastWatch Utilities** is a software package for viewing, inspecting, and processing NOAA/NESDIS CoastWatch satellite data products. It is designed for scientific data formats that are not practical to open with standard image viewers.

## What It Includes

The package provides both:

- Graphical tools for interactive data exploration
- Command-line tools for repeatable processing and automation

Typical tasks include:

- Inspecting file contents and computing summary statistics
- Converting formats, sampling data, and performing variable math
- Creating rendered images and other visual products
- Resampling data between map projections and correcting navigation

## Availability

The CoastWatch Utilities package and latest user's guide is available for **Windows**, **macOS**, and **Linux** from 
the [NOAA CoastWatch website](https://coastwatch.noaa.gov/cwn/data-access-tools/coastwatch-utilities.html).  The user's guide describes installation and system requirements.

## Online Course

The [CoastWatch Utilities Online Course](https://coastwatch-training.github.io/CoastWatch-Utilities/) provides a structured introduction to the software for processing satellite imagery and derived data products.

The course covers:

- Working with data visually through the graphical interface
- Using command-line tools from Unix or Windows terminals
- Following practical examples without requiring prior programming experience
